location: Random drop (about 4% chance at 100 Discovery) from Grave Warden Duelists patrolling outside the Royal Colosseum in Leyndell, Royal Capital, reachable from the West Capital Rampart grace.
tactics: Rest at West Capital Rampart, then hunt the duelists patrolling near the colosseum walls outside the arena entrance.
Only the hammer-wielding duelists drop it — other duelists in the same patrol carry different weapons and won't.
Drop chance is low, so stack Discovery gear (Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot, Silver Scarab talisman, Gold Scarab) and rest to respawn enemies.
These enemies stop spawning permanently once Maliketh, the Black Blade is defeated, so farm before finishing that questline.
lore: A crude iron hammer built for gladiatorial combat, once wielded by duelists cast out of the Colosseum. It's heavy enough to crush armor — and the person wearing it — in a single blow.

builds.name: Pure Strength brawler
builds.why: C-scaling Strength with a negligible Dex requirement makes it a straightforward heavy hitter for a Str dump-stat build; Braggart's Roar buffs your own damage and poise before a big swing.
